column5:
Masterstroke: Once per game:
Gain +1 Influence to 2 Factions.
column6: Scheme: Pay 1 Solari: Draw 1 Intrigue card.

column5:
Landsraad popularity: Sending an Agent to 
a Green board space costs you 1 Solari less.
column6: Prudent Diplomacy: Pay 1 Spice: Gain 1 Influence with a Faction where an opponent has more than you.

column5:
Eyes Everywhere: Enemy Agents don't block
your Agents at Green or Blue board spaces.
column6:
Manipulate: Remove a card in the Imperium Row.
Acquire this  card for 1 Persuation less.

column5: Arrakis Fiefdom: At game start: +1 Spice and +1 Solari.
column6:
Brutality: +1 Troop or +2 Troops
if you have at least 1 Faction Alliance.

column5:
Ruthless Negotiator: When you pay Solari for the cost
of a board Space: Draw 1 card.

Careful Observation: Use Snooper tokens on the
Influence track to gain rewards.
column6: Duplicity: Lose 1 Influence: Gain 1 Influence with a Faction where you have a Snooper token.

column5:
Coördination: At reveal turn:
You may trash one of your cards In Play.
column6:
Conscript: You may acquire a card
that costs 3 Persuation or les.

column5:
Prescience: You may look at the top card
of your deck at any time.

Connections: When you take a High Counsil seat:
Gain +1 Influence.

Smuggling Operation: At game start: no Water.
When you gain Solari on your turn, gain +1 Solari.
column6:
Final Delivery: Pay 7 Solari:
Gain +1 Influence, +1 Troop, +1 Spice

column5:
Intelligence: At game start: Look at the top 2 cards of
the Intrigue deck. Keep 1, put the other back on top.

Spice Addict: When you harvest spice:
gain 1 less spice and draw 1 card.

One step ahead: Round start: Set aside a card.
If you use it to send an Agent: Gain Spice or Solari.
column6: Guild contacts: Pay 1 Solari: Gain 1 Foldspace card.

column5:
Heavy Lasgun Cannons: Your dreadnoughts have
4 strength (instead of 3).
column6: Ixian Technology: Acquire Tech or Tech Negotiation.
